## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance remains consistent after recent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Focus on balancing SEO-driven content with sophisticated, high-quality pieces for mid-market and enterprise segments](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Need to align template content with current Yourco product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Ongoing challenges with Google indexing of new content, being addressed manually](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Performance consistent after recent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Balancing content types:](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
      - [SEO-driven articles (e.g., onboarding in Vietnamese/Spanish)](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [High-quality, sophisticated content for mid-market/enterprise (e.g., beyond "What is lean manufacturing?")](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Proposal to enrich well-performing article on safety alert templates](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Interlink strategy for translation-specific content to boost SEO](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Template Content Alignment

  - [Need to revise templates to accurately reflect current Yourco product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Ensure content doesn't undermine or misrepresent Yourco's features](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Extended timeline (2-3 weeks) required for detailed template revisions](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Goal: Create one high-quality template per quarter for reuse across content](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Legal and Compliance Content

  - [Avoid giving specific legal advice or interpretations](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Soften language (e.g., "could" instead of "should")](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Frame compliance as complex but manageable with Yourco's help](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Joe (content writer) updated artifacts and writing instructions to address this](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### Google Indexing Issues

  - [Some new content not being indexed automatically](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Carrie manually submitting up to 10 URLs daily for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [13 older articles (from March) still not indexed](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Considering refreshing/enriching older content to trigger indexing](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### CMS and Content Publishing

  - [Current focus on automating publishing pipeline to Prismic staging](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Discussing potential for scanning system to detect broken links and typos](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Exploring CMS options that balance engineering setup with marketing team autonomy](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to send list of non-indexed articles for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Darrell to share CMS comparison list focusing on ease of use vs. engineering requirements](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Carrie to drop message in Slack about proposed new article topic](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Team to continue refining content strategy balancing SEO and high-quality pieces](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Ongoing manual submission of new content for Google indexing](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Consider attending upcoming GrowthX workshop on content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/pudvyrm9e65qfnR2wexX2HdNC-_2F5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
